error_signature: The service is receiving too many requests from you
title: HTTP 429 Rate Limit Error in HTTP Request Node
symptom: When executing a workflow that makes multiple HTTP requests, the second request fails with a 'too many requests' error. This prevents further execution of the workflow.
applies_when: Making multiple requests to the same API
not_this_if: API does not enforce rate limits
root_cause: The error occurs because the API being called has a rate limit that restricts the number of requests that can be made in a given time frame. When this limit is exceeded, the API responds with a 429 status code, indicating that the client should slow down.
fix_steps: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff in your workflow
Consider adding delays between requests to stay within the API's rate limits
Batch requests if the API supports it to reduce the number of calls
agent_instruction: Add retry logic and delays between HTTP requests in your workflow to avoid hitting rate limits.
